title: Quilted Fabric API (QFAPI) / QSL - Biomefix - 1.18.2
description: Patched QFAPI to add support for mods like BetterEnd/BetterNether on 1.18.2
body: This is a modified version of QSL/QFAPI to add back some classes that were removed due to not being intended and being unstable for mod development. Removal of these classes lead to some mods losing compatibility with quilt on 1.18.2 like BetterEnd and BetterNether. Some of these mods did add quilt support but only on the latest versions(~1.19). This "patch" enables those mods to be quilt compatible on 1.18.2 due to 1.18.2 still being a widely played version. This isn't exactly the best solution but does the job, I haven't found a mod that is incompatible with the patch but if you do find an incompatible mod, report it on github to this repo and not to Quilt. DO NOT REPORT ISSUES TO QUILT.
